# leifwind_fields (Data Source)

List fields of an entity, optionally filtered by a name substring pattern.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# List every field of an entity.
data "leifwind_fields" "all" {
  project_id = "00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000"
  entity_id  = "00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001"
}

# List fields whose name contains "tit".
data "leifwind_fields" "filtered" {
  project_id = "00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000"
  entity_id  = "00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001"
  pattern    = "tit"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `entity_id` (String) Owning entity id (UUID).
- `project_id` (String) Owning project id (UUID).

### Optional

- `pattern` (String) Substring filter on the name (server-side ILIKE).

### Read-Only

- `fields` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--fields))

<a id="nestedatt--fields"></a>
### Nested Schema for `fields`

Read-Only:

- `connection_type` (String)
- `data_type` (String)
- `fragment_name` (String)
- `id` (String)
- `name` (String)
